request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense funding, but let's be real - we've seen how unprepared we were during the last major crisis. The new bill isn't about fearmongering, it's about making sure we're ready when things go wrong. My neighbor lost everything in the floods last year, and the emergency response was a disaster. We can't afford to cut corners on this. #CivilDefenseMatters #PreparedNotScared
